crons.comment: Every minute. Rotation: minute%5 → pair index. Each pair updated once per 5 minutes. 288 calls/day × 2 credits = 576/day (under 800 free limit). Full cycle: 5 minutes.
Every 10 minutes. Polls 25+ RSS feeds, analyzes with Gemini AI (skips if last event < 4h old), creates globe ripple events.
Every 30 minutes. Fetches from NewsData.io (no AI needed). 48 calls/day, well under 200/day free limit.
Every 5 minutes. USGS earthquake feed — no API key, no rate limit.
Every 30 minutes. Open-Meteo Air Quality — refreshes one zone per call.
Every hour. Open-Meteo wind + temperature — refreshes one zone per call.
Every 6 hours. Open-Meteo Marine sea surface temperature.
Every 6 hours. Purges data older than 3 days. The route itself tracks last run time and skips if <6h have passed — so it's safe to call frequently and resilient to server downtime.
